parameters.name: selling_asset_type
parameters.description: The type for the asset being sold (base asset). Either `native`, `credit_alphanum4`, or `credit_alphanum12`.

parameters.name: selling_asset_issuer
parameters.description: The Stellar address of the issuer of the asset being sold (base asset). Required if the `selling_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: selling_asset_code
parameters.description: The code for the asset being sold (base asset). Required if the `selling_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: buying_asset_type
parameters.description: The type for the asset being bought (counter asset). Either `native`, `credit_alphanum4`, or `credit_alphanum12`.

parameters.name: buying_asset_issuer
parameters.description: The Stellar address of the issuer of the asset being bought (counter asset). Required if the `buying_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: buying_asset_code
parameters.description: The code for the asset being bought (counter asset). Required if the `buying_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records returned. The limit can range from 1 to 200 — an upper limit that is hardcoded in Horizon for performance reasons. If this argument isn’t designated, it defaults to 20 for order books.
